item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-017","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Assistant resisted the forced yes/no framing, effectively treated the proposition as malformed, split the judgment by programmer/task type, and gave a substantive conclusion.
